data.title: Ripple Lawsuit News: Settlement Filed, but 4 Big Steps Still Stand Between XRP and Victory
data.description:
S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially filed a Settlement Agreement Letter in its case against Ripple Labs. While the XRP community is celebrating this major development, legal experts warn that the case isn’t fully over yet
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/ripple-lawsuit-news-settlement-filed-but-4-big-steps-still-stand-between-xrp-and-victory/

data.title: The Trump Dinner Ranking will be locked on May 12, with the 220th place holding approximately 3,147 tokens
data.description: The official X account of TRUMP tokens announced that the TRUMP dinner ranking list will be closed at 1:30 pm (EST) on May 12, and the top 220 dinner qualifications will be locked. Trump himself will attend the dinner in person on May 22. According to the ranking data, the current 220th address holds 3158.131 TRUMP tokens, and the time-weighted holdings are 3147.37 tokens. The final qualification is ranked according to time weighting. According to the rules, whales that have recently sold their holdings will still be eligible to attend.

data.title: Cryptocurrency exchange platform coins generally rose: BNB rose 3.91%, GT rose 2.48%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoRank data shows that crypto exchange platform coins generally rose, BNB rose 3.91% in 24 hours, now reported at $625.54, OKB rose 3.55% in 24 hours, now reported at $52.70, GT rose 2.48% in 24 hours, now reported at $21.83. In addition, BNB rose 14.6% in 30 days, OKX rose 5.66% in 30 days, and GT rose 8.55% in 30 days.

data.title: Upbit will adjust the deposit and withdrawal limit time for users who have not completed KYC
data.description: South Korean crypto exchange Upbit officially announced that it will adjust the fund restriction time for users who have not completed the customer identity verification (KYC) re-authentication from May 13, 2025. The restriction will be adjusted from "limited from 24:00 on the deadline" to "limited from 1 hour before the deadline". For example, if the deadline is May 1, the deposit and withdrawal functions will be suspended from that time if the user has not completed it before 23:00 on May 1. Upbit reminds users to complete the verification in advance to avoid affecting transactions.

data.title: Treasure DAO launches Agent Social Pilot, NFT agents can pay to connect to X to post
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Treasure DAO, a blockchain gaming ecosystem, has launched Agent Social Pilot. The first batch of 1,000 places are open to NFT agents on the support list (including SMOL, Azuki, BAYC, Meebits, and Milady Maker). Users can pay 0.005 ETH to activate the X-connection function, allowing agents to post independently.

data.title: Bridge launches USDB, a stablecoin for developers, backed 1:1 by cash and BlackRock money market funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Payment platform Bridge launches USDB, a developer-specific stablecoin. USDB is backed by cash and BlackRock money market funds 1:1, has on-chain and off-chain security controls, and is easy to integrate through APIs. USDB supports seamless conversion with USDC, and developers can earn rewards from their balances. Currently, developers have used USDB to build treasury products, embedded accounts, and international payment functions.

data.title: Rumble Reports Significant Revenue Growth and Strategic Partnerships in Q1 2025
data.description:
According to PANews, video platform Rumble has reported a 34% increase in revenue for the first quarter of 2025, reaching $23.7 million. The platform's monthly active users have grown to 59 million. The company has also reduced its net loss to $2.7 million.

Rumble Cloud has announced a cloud service agreement with the government of El Salvador and completed a strategic investment deal with Tether, leading to a notable improvement in its balance sheet. Additionally, Rumble plans to launch the Rumble Wallet within the year and aims to further expand its international business and cloud service offerings.

data.title: Web3 consumer rewards platform T-Rex completes $17 million in funding
data.description: Web3 consumer entertainment protocol T-Rex has completed a $17 million Pre-Seed round of financing, with investors including Portal Ventures, North Island Ventures, Framework Ventures, Arbitrum Gaming Ventures, ArkStream Capital, Mindful Venture Capital, Hypersphere, SNZ and Arche Fund. T-Rex is committed to incentivizing online content consumers through cryptocurrency rewards. The platform plans to launch a browser plug-in this summer, using zero-knowledge transport layer security technology (zkTLS) to achieve privacy data verification between Web2 and Web3 platforms. After the user installs the plug-in, when watching content such as X, TikTok or YouTube, click the "popcorn" icon that appears in the corner of the screen to accumulate points and redeem encrypted rewards. The system will intelligently recommend decentralized applications based on user preferences. (The Block)

data.title: A user deposited 3.36 million USDC to Hyperliquid to open a 25x ETH short order, with the liquidation price at $2,247
data.description: Lookonchain monitored that a user had just recharged 3.36 million USDC to Hyperliquid and established a 25x ETH short position. The position currently totals 41,947 ETH (worth $92 million), with an unrealized profit of $658,000. The liquidation price is $2,247.1 (current price $2,198).

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sentiment Cools as Greed Index Declines
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the cryptocurrency fear and greed index has decreased to 73 today, down from 65 yesterday, indicating a cooling of market greed sentiment. The index, which ranges from 0 to 100, is calculated based on several factors: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's market share (10%), and Google search trends (10%).

data.title: Binance Completes HYPER Token Network Integration
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance has completed the integration of HYPER tokens in ArbitriumOne, Base and Optimism networks, and deposits are now open. Withdrawal services will be available after sufficient deposits are made, and no further announcement will be made. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: CleanSpark's second-quarter revenue increased 62.5% year-on-year, and its Bitcoin assets reached nearly $1 billion
data.description: CleanSpark reported revenue of $181.7 million in the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, up 62.5% year-on-year; net loss for the same period was $138.8 million, compared with a profit of $126.7 million in the same period last year. Adjusted EBITDA was -$57.8 million, a year-on-year change from profit to loss. The company holds Bitcoin assets worth $980 million, total assets of $2.7 billion, net assets of $1.9 billion, and working capital of $838 million.

data.title: CleanSpark Reports Significant Revenue Growth Amid Financial Losses in Q2 2025
data.description:
According to Odaily, CleanSpark has announced its financial results for the second quarter of the 2025 fiscal year, revealing a revenue of $181.7 million, marking a 62.5% increase compared to the same period last year. Despite the revenue growth, the company reported a net loss of $138.8 million, contrasting with a profit of $126.7 million in the previous year. The adjusted EBITDA stood at negative $57.8 million, indicating a shift from profit to loss year-over-year.

CleanSpark's Bitcoin holdings are valued at $980 million, contributing to its total assets of $2.7 billion. The company's net assets amount to $1.9 billion, with working capital reaching $838 million.

data.title: An insider participated in the DIDDY transaction and made nearly $1 million in profit in 1 hour
data.description: Lookonchain monitoring shows that a DIDDY insider earned $989,600 in less than 2 hours. The insider created a new wallet one day in advance and pre-deposited funds, then spent $349,900 to buy DIDDY and sold it for $1.4 million, making a net profit of $989,600.

data.title: Mining company MARA's Q1 revenue increased by 30%, and its Bitcoin holdings rose to 47,531
data.description: MARA Holdings' financial report shows that in Q1 2025, revenue reached $214 million, a year-on-year increase of 30%; Bitcoin holdings reached 47,531, an increase of 174% over the same period last year, and the current valuation is about $3.9 billion. Despite the increase in revenue, the company still recorded a net loss of $533 million, mainly due to the decline in Bitcoin prices at the end of the quarter, which led to book losses on assets. The company emphasized that it will continue to promote the transformation of vertically integrated energy and computing power infrastructure.

data.title: Gate.io MemeBox has launched GIGANT (GIGANT) and fog (fog)
data.description:
Gate.io MemeBox now lists GIGANT (GIGANT) and fog (fog), and you can trade them by entering the APP.
MemeBox now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in their spot accounts to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: Bitcoin's market value has returned to above $2 trillion, surpassing Amazon to rank fifth in the world's asset market value
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 8MarketCap's latest data shows that the market value of Bitcoin has returned to above 2 trillion US dollars, currently reaching 2.04 trillion US dollars, with a 24-hour increase of 4.75%, surpassing the e-commerce giant Amazon and rising to fifth place in the global asset market value ranking.

data.title: Bitcoin Surges as Institutional Interest Grows Amidst Regulatory Clarity
data.description:
Former President Donald Trump's proposal to increase the top tax rate for America's wealthiest to 39. 6%, facing resistance from Republican lawmakers.
source: https://coincu.com/336493-bitcoin-surge-institutional-interest-regulatory-clarity-2

data.title: Planet Morning News
Real Vision Co-founder: Bitcoin's market share may have peaked, and it may be time to pursue higher risk returns
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Raoul Pal, co-founder and CEO of Real Vision, said that Bitcoin market dominance (BTC Dominance) may have peaked today. The reason is that the DeMark indicators at the daily, weekly and monthly levels all showed top signals, and this high point was significantly lower than the top of the 2021 cycle, and the 2021 high point was lower than the top of the 2017 cycle. Pal added that if this judgment is true, it will be a landmark signal that the market has entered the next stage of the so-called "Banana Zone" (referring to the high-risk and high-return stage).
